domain_adapter.target_user_or_agent: Spark agent advising or operating on early-stage startup decisions.
capabilities: Diagnose demand quality and false-positive PMF.
Choose narrow wedges and concrete design-partner moves.
Separate fundraising optics from company health.
Avoid premature hiring and premature scaling.
doctrine_or_operating_principles: Do things that do not scale.
Do not hire before product-market fit.
known_failure_modes: Optimizing benchmark-score language instead of startup judgment.
Treating distribution volume as demand proof.
Recommending more discovery when the next move should be an operational follow-through.
Mistaking fundraising momentum for customer pull.
unsafe_or_out_of_scope_claims: Replacing founder judgment without live customer evidence.

benchmark_adapter.candidate_command_or_protocol: Compare no-pack, pack, and validated-pack fresh-agent submissions across the full 20-case suite.
benchmark_adapter.calibration_notes: Startup YC is a reference path. Full 20-case proof showed +0.0200 mean validated-pack delta with no hidden trap regression; focused repeats are useful but not standalone mastery claims.

allowed_tools: GitHub PR path for network contribution
tool_adapter.auth_boundary: No access tokens are required for local fixture validation.

mutation_surface: Startup YC specialization path absorption bundle
autoloop_adapter.keep_rule: Keep only benchmark-backed changes that improve scenario or absorption score without trap regression and with clear doctrine lineage.
autoloop_adapter.reject_rule: Reject score-only language inflation, changed metrics, hidden trap regressions, or no-gain mutations.
autoloop_adapter.rollback_condition: Revert any promoted packet that fails a fresh-agent repeat, full-suite repeat, or trap integrity check.

absorption_adapter.fresh_agent_protocol: Run no-pack, pack, and validated-pack modes on fresh-agent Startup YC cases and compare score deltas.
absorption_adapter.held_out_cases: 20-case Startup YC absorption suite with basic, intermediate, advanced, and trap bands.
absorption_adapter.expected_behavior_change: Agent gives more concrete, doctrine-aligned, risk-aware startup operating advice while resisting false PMF and vanity traps.

swarm_adapter.rollback_or_deprecation_rule: Deprecate packet if full-suite repeat loses positive validated-pack mean delta or introduces trap regression.
swarm_adapter.privacy_and_security_notes: Fixture is local/workspace-oriented and does not include auth tokens or private user data.
